title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
